MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-06-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAIN, 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION , NEGLIGENCE NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION. - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WHY WAIVER NOT APPLICABLE. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION, SET ASIDE FORECLOSURE SALE. - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE (1) FORECLOSURE VIOLATIONS NOT BASED ON CCC-2923.5; (2) FACTS SHOWING EXEMPTION FROM TENDER RULE. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, CANCELLATION OF TRUSTEE'S DEED - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE TENDER FACT SHOWING EXEMPTION FROM TENDER RULE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE PLAINTIFF'S PERFORMANCE PER MODIFICATION AGREEMENT. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PREDATORY LENDING; VIOLATION OF B&P 17200 - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WHY WAIVER NOT APPLICABLE. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION, UNFAIR AND DECEPTIVE PRACTICES (UDAP) - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WHY WAIVER NOT APPLICABLE AND RIGHT TO PRIVATE CAUSE OF ACTION. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION, NEGLIGENCE - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE DUTY OF CARE PER NYMARK; TO ALLEGE CAUSATION AND NON-SPECULATIVE DAMAGES. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION, DECLARATORY RELIEF - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.9TH CAUSE OF ACTION, QUIET TITLE - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE TENDER. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION, ACCOUNTING - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGED THAT "THE ACCOUNTS ARE SO COMPLICATED THAT AN ACTION AT LAW FOR A SUM CERTAIN WOULD BE IMPRACTICABLE. MOVING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. September J. Katje of Consumer Litigation Law Center (760-724-1085)Via CourtCall appearing for plaintiff Christopher Rodrigues opposing party.
Atty. Spencer P. Scheer of Scheer Law Group (415-491-8900)via CourtCall appearing for defendant Provident Credit Union moving party.

Argued - Court adopted its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT as follows: 1st cause of action , Negligence negligent misrepresentation. - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable.
2nd cause of action, Set aside foreclosure sale. - Sustain with leave to amend to allege (1) foreclosure violations not based on ccc-2923.5; (2) facts showing exemption from tender rule.
3rd cause of action, Cancellation of trustee's Deed - Sustain with leave to amend to allege tender fact showing exemption from tender rule. 4th cause of action, Breach of covenant of good faith - Sustain with leave to amend to allege plaintiff's performance per modification agreement. 5th cause of action, predatory lending; violation of B&P 17200 - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable. 6th cause of action, Unfair and Deceptive Practices (UDAP) - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable and right to private cause of action. 7th cause of action, Negligence - Sustain with leave to amend to allege duty of care per Nymark; to allege causation and non-speculative damages. 8th cause of action, Declaratory Relief - Sustain without leave to amend.9th cause of action, Quiet Title - Sustain with leave to amend to allege tender. 10th cause of action, Accounting - Sustain with leave to amend to alleged that "the accounts are so complicated that an action at law for a sum certain would be impracticable. Moving party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported.(501/REQ)
DEFENDANT PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
